[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Briera''' was the Imperial officer in command of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Motivator (Imperial-class)|''Motivator'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Briera commanded the ''Motivator'' during its [[Battle of Maldra IV|attack]] on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[Maldra IV]]. Briera was known as the "Butcher of [[Baummu]]" to Rebel forces.<ref name="Galaxywide NewsNets" />
